summary: Fail: the associated-files summary now claims linked files exist based on static placeholder data, so the designer baseline is misleading before real associated-file lineage is available; the required 3101 browser smoke evidence also remains missing.

findings.description: The summary badge/count is derived from the hard-coded placeholder catalog, so the fresh initiation form reports associated files as already linked (for example `已关联 12 个文件`) even though the M1 baseline is supposed to stay explainable as a placeholder until real lineage-backed data exists.

Coverage was only added for the pure helper output. There is still no component-level test proving `AssociatedFilesList`/`InitiateReviewPanel` render the placeholder baseline versus a real linked-files state, which is why the rendered-state mismatch was not caught.

The feature contract requires initiation-side browser smoke evidence via `http://127.0.0.1:3101/`, but the implementation handoff explicitly left that step undone and recorded no interactive checks, so sign-off validation remains incomplete.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `review-initiation-worker` procedure requires live browser verification on 3101, but the worker still returned success after skipping that step.
sharedStateObservations.why: This review had to treat the missing browser smoke as an outstanding validation gap even though the feature handoff was marked successful, so scrutiny synthesis may need to align worker success criteria with the documented procedure.
